headline: Qualcomm’s Data Center Debut Reshapes AI And Automotive Growth Story
summary: Qualcomm (NasdaqGS:QCOM) has started shipping data center processors to a major hyperscaler, marking its entry into large scale cloud infrastructure. The company reports record activity in its automotive segment, alongside progress in Internet of Things (IoT) products. Recent launches of AI focused Snapdragon platforms expand Qualcomm's portfolio beyond smartphones into broader computing use cases. Qualcomm is widely associated with smartphone chips, but its latest moves show a broader...
